features: All-in-One Creative Makeup Activity Kit: 1 spiral-bound make-up artist magazine(6.9 x 8.6 in), 8 makeup pages, 8 double-side dress-up pages, 4 PVC outfit stencils, 8 crayons, 6 blendable eyeshadows, 6 outfit stickers, 6 decorative stickers, 1 craft scissors, 1 fashion coordination page and instructions--Perfect for endless artistic creations.

Interactive Dress-Up & Sticker Fun: Open up the makeup book and create all kinds of looks for your favorite character! Design pretty hair & makeup designs by using pretend eyeshadows and crayons without real makeup stains! Mix & match outfit stickers, and accessories to boost aesthetic sense & storytelling skills. Pure joy for little fashion lovers!

Portable & Organized: The craft book measured 6.9" x 8.6". The appropriate size and portable design, perfect to carry in the car or for a long trip, compact and mess-free making them perfect for travel activities. Spiral-bound books keep pages organized. Snap-shut magnetic cover keeps all pieces securely stored. Neat and organized ready for dress-up fun on the go. Ideal for road trips, travel toys and family vacations!

Learning Through Play: Inspire your little fashionista with a safe and travel-ready makeup activity book! This craft kit combines pretend makeup play, sticker dress-up, and coloring activities—no messy faces or stained clothes. Perfect for developing creativity, fine motor skills, and color coordination while keeping kids engaged for hours without batteries or devices.

Creative Gift for Girls: The paper makeup set for kids makes delightful gifts for birthdays, Easter, Christmas, and more! Also, fantastic travel activities for car rides, planes, and road trips. Delight your child with a gift that combines fun, creativity, and educational value. Perfect for any budding fashion lovers—wherever they go!
